name: HRC_EVT_OBJ_CHANGES
description:
A Source Object Change Instancet identifies a particular entity object or PLSQL row handler record that changed as part of a transaction. The PK1 - PK9 values correspond to the Source Object Attribute record PRIMARY_KEY and PK_SEQ columns.
N.B. The Effective Dates of a date effective EO are not stored in this table, only the primary key of the logical DE entity.

columns.Name: CHANGE_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of a set of Object Changes that are related to each other

columns.Name: CHANGE_GROUP_SEQUENCE
columns.Comments: Sequence of the Object Change within a group of related changes

columns.Name: OPERATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: The type of Operation that brought about the Event Audit. In the case of a non-Date Effective entity this will simply be the DML Mode. In the case of a DE entity it will be one of the set of DE Operations.

columns.Name: DATE_EFFECTIVE_MODE
columns.Comments: For Date Effective entities the date effective mode or pseudo mode used to create the change.

columns.Name: VALIDATION_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Start of date range over which the changes occurred (DE entities only)

columns.Name: VALIDATION_END_DATE
columns.Comments: End of date range over which the changes occurred (DE entities only)

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_DATE
columns.Comments: For DE entities, the Effective Date of the change

columns.Name: PURGE_DATE
columns.Comments: Date on which the Event Audit data can be purged

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
